title: Qualifying higher plant notification (reference: 25/Q01)
body: "This document is a notice of intention to release a qualifying higher plant under schedule 3A of the Genetically Modified Organisms (Deliberate Release) (Amendment) (England) Regulations 2022.  The release will be made under a project titled ‘Tomatoes optimized for indoor growth’, starting on or after 1 April 2025.  For further information contact the Defra GM team.  Email: gm-regulation@defra.gov.uk. "
